title: The Wobbly Bridge
cover_description: Boomy sits in a flat pile of broken sticks, arms crossed like a king on a throne, while Pip giggles on his lap.
host_intro: Tonight, Pip tries to cross Boomy’s brand-new bridge. It’s brand-new wobbly.
host_outro: Boomy’s bridge is now a pile of sticks. He’s still on it.
script:
[TITLE: The Wobbly Bridge]
[HOST_INTRO: Tonight, Pip tries to cross Boomy’s brand-new bridge. It’s brand-new wobbly.]
[HOST_OUTRO: Boomy’s bridge is now a pile of sticks. He’s still on it.]
[AGE: 2-5]
[VOICES: high_pitch_cartoon, comedic_villain, musical_original]
[COMEDY_TYPE: sound_effect]

[SETUP]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: gentle, wistful] Welcome to the riverbank, friends. [STING: musical_flourish]
[PIP] [DELIVERY: curious, excited] Ooooh! A long, bouncy, wiggly stick path over the water! [STING: boing]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: confident, triumphant] Behold! My magnificent, unbreakable, kingly bridge! [STING: villain_entrance]

[BEAT_1]
[PIP] [DELIVERY: tentative] I’m stepping on… why is it hopping like a frog? [STING: boing]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: dismissive] Pfft. That’s just the royal wobble. Walk faster. [STING: slide_whistle]
[PIP] [DELIVERY: panicked] I walked faster! Now it’s bouncing me into the air! [STING: boing]

[BEAT_2]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] My bridge is… performing an acrobatic routine? [STING: musical_detuned]
[PIP] [DELIVERY: excited] Wheee! I’m flying over the treetops! [STING: whoosh]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: scrambling] No no no! Land gently! Gently! [STING: slide_whistle]
[PIP] [DELIVERY: stunned] I landed… on your head. Now we’re both wobbling. [STING: boing]

[BEAT_3]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: desperate, loud] ABANDON BRIDGE! [STING: villain_dramatic]
[PIP] [DELIVERY: quiet, calm gotcha] Too late. The sticks are… snapping like twigs. [STING: splat]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: deflated] My unbreakable bridge just… turned into a pile of sticks. [STING: deflation]
[PIP] [DELIVERY: delighted] And we’re… sitting in a stick nest! [STING: sweet_eyeroll]

[BUTTON]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: desperate, loud] [PUNCHLINE]I meant to build a stick nest all along![/PUNCHLINE] [STING: villain_fail]

[COVER: Boomy sits in a flat pile of broken sticks, arms crossed like a king on a throne, while Pip giggles on his lap.]
[PREMISE: Bridge wobbles until it breaks]
